channel.title: Blogs on VBOX
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on VBOX

item.title: Influence of multiple detachments on structural vergence and evolution of the thin-skinned fold-and-thrust belt in the eastern Sichuan Basin:insights from numerical modeling
item.description: Xu, W., Yin, H.*, Zhao, S.,Zhang, C., Li, B., Jia, D., Li, C., Wang, W., 2024. Influence of multiple detachments on structural vergence and evolution of the thin-skinned fold-and-thrust belt in the eastern Sichuan Basin: Insights from numerical modeling,Journal of Structural Geology,180:105068. Title Influence of multiple detachments on structural vergence and evolution of the thin-skinned fold-and-thrust belt in the eastern Sichuan Basin: insights from numerical modeling Authors Wenqiao Xu1, Hongwei Yin1*,Shengxian Zhao2, Chenglin Zhang2, Bo Li2, Dong Jia1, Changsheng Li3 and Wei Wang1

item.title: Influence of Surface Processes on Strain Localization and Seismic Activity in the Longmen Shan Fold-and-Thrust Belt:Insights From Discrete-Element Modeling(Tectonics)
item.description: 本文VBOX(ZDEM)实验脚本下载： The code for our DEM experiments can be obtained from Open Science Framework (Model I-1, no surface processes, https://osf.io/tz2qg; Model I-2, with surface processes, https://osf.io/pa9sy). Wang, M., Wang, M., Feng, W., Yan, B., & Jia, D. (2022). Influence of surface processes on strain localization and seismic activity in the Longmen Shan

item.title: Control of mechanical stratigraphy on the stratified style of strike-slip faults in the central Tarim Craton, NW China(Tectonophysics)
item.description: Chen, J., He, D., Tian, F., Huang, C., Ma, D., Zhang, W., 2022. Control of mechanical stratigraphy on the stratified style of strike-slip faults in the central Tarim Craton, NW China. Tectonophysics 830, 229307. doi: 10.1016/j.tecto.2022.229307. IF2020 = 3.933 Title Control of mechanical stratigraphy on the stratified style of strike-slip faults in the central Tarim Craton, NW China Authors Jiajun Chen1, 2， Dengfa He1, 2, Fanglei Tian1, 2, Cheng

item.title: Effects of Salt Thickness on the Structural Deformation of Foreland Fold-and-Thrust Belt in the Kuqa Depression
item.description: Download Li C, Yin H, Wu Z, Zhou P, Wang W, Ren R, Guan S, Li X, Luo H and Jia D (2021) Effects of Salt Thickness on the Structural Deformation of Foreland Fold-and-Thrust Belt in the Kuqa Depression, Tarim Basin: Insights From Discrete Element Models. Front. Earth Sci. 9:655173. Title Effects of Salt Thickness on the Structural Deformation of Foreland Fold-and-Thrust Belt in the Kuqa Depression, Tarim Basin: Insights From Discrete Element Models

item.title: Influence of Regional Erosion and Sedimentary Loading on Fault Activities in Active Fold-Thrust Belts
item.description: Wu Z, Yin H, Li C, Yang X, Wang L, Wang F, Dong S and Jia D (2021) Influence of Regional Erosion and Sedimentary Loading on Fault Activities in Active Fold-Thrust Belts: Insights From Discrete Element Simulation and the Southern and Central Longmen Shan Fold- Thrust Belt. Front. Earth Sci. 9:659682. doi: 10.3389/feart.2021.659682 Title Influence of Regional Erosion and Sedimentary Loading on Fault Activities in Active Fold-Thrust Belts: Insights From Discrete Element Simulation and the Southern and Central Longmen Shan Fold-Thrust Belt

item.title: Structural features and evolution of the northwestern Sichuan Basin Insights from discrete numerical simulations
item.description: Xu, W., Yin, H., Jia, D., Li, C., Wang, W., Yang, G., He, W., Chen, Z., Ren, R., 2021. Structural Features and Evolution of the Northwestern Sichuan Basin: Insights From Discrete Numerical Simulations. Frontiers in Earth Science, 9:653395. Title Structural features and evolution of the northwestern Sichuan Basin Insights from discrete numerical simulations Authors Wenqiao Xu1, Hongwei Yin1*, Dong Jia1, Changsheng Li2, Wei Wang1, Gengxiong Yang1, Wanhui He1, Zhuxin Chen3 and Rong Ren3

item.title: New VBOX website has been published
item.description: VBOX的用户们，大家好，我是VBOX官网维护者及VBOX软件开发者 李长圣 。 经过半个多月的迁移，VBOX官网全新改版，今天正式上线了！ VBO

item.title: Validation Tests for Discrete Element Codes Using Single-Contact Systems
item.description: Download：MATLAB codes Solve_T1_T2_T3_T4.m Fs.m PFC codes Fn_T1_T2final.txt Fs_T3_T4final.txt The stability of a single contact system in discrete element model was tested from the analytical solution, see Full Paper。
